gmcm.forage.ground.label: Ground Forageables
gmcm.forage.ground.description: Collect items found on the ground (Daffodils, Leeks, Clams, etc.)
gmcm.forage.crops.label: Forage Crops
gmcm.forage.bushes.label: Harvestable Bushes
gmcm.forage.bushes.description: Collect from bushes (Salmonberries, Blackberries, Green Tea Leaves)
gmcm.perks.xp.label: Grant Foraging XP
gmcm.perks.xp.description: Player earns Foraging XP for auto-collected items
gmcm.perks.botanist.label: Apply Botanist Perk
gmcm.perks.botanist.description: If the player has the Botanist perk, auto-collected forage is iridium quality
gmcm.perks.gatherer.label: Apply Gatherer Perk
gmcm.perks.gatherer.description: If the player has the Gatherer perk, there is a chance to double-harvest
gmcm.locations.farm.label: Farm & Surroundings
gmcm.locations.town.label: Pelican Town
gmcm.locations.forest.label: Forest & Secret Woods
gmcm.locations.forest.description: Forest, Backwoods, Secret Woods (requires Steel Axe)
gmcm.locations.beach.label: Beach & Tide Pools
gmcm.locations.beach.description: Beach and Tide Pools (bridge must be repaired)
gmcm.locations.mountain.label: Mountain & Lake
gmcm.locations.mountain.description: Mountain, Quarry, Mines area (landslide cleared Spring 5)
gmcm.locations.railroad.label: Railroad & Bathhouse
gmcm.locations.desert.label: Desert
gmcm.locations.island.label: Ginger Island
gmcm.locations.island.description: All Ginger Island outdoor locations (requires boat repair)
gmcm.locations.sewer.label: Sewer
gmcm.locations.woods.label: Secret Woods
gmcm.restrictions.enforce.label: Enforce Location Progression
gmcm.restrictions.enforce.description: When enabled, the Auto Forager can only visit locations the player has unlocked
gmcm.multiplayer.shared.label: Shared Machines
gmcm.multiplayer.shared.description: When enabled, all players share one forage pool. When disabled, each player's machine collects independently. Default follows money sharing setting.
gmcm.hotkey.log.label: View Daily Log
gmcm.hotkey.log.description: Hotkey to open the last day's forage log
gmcm.entity.sighting.label: Sighting Chance
gmcm.entity.sighting.description: Percentage chance (0-100) of the Auto Forager entity appearing when you enter a location. Default: 25
hud.collected.overnight: The Auto Forager collected forage from all available locations overnight. You may now empty its inventory.
hud.pickup.notempty: Empty the Auto Forager's inventory before picking it up!
hud.not.placed: Auto Forager cannot harvest forage until placed!
machine.name: Auto Forager
machine.description: Place anywhere. Automatically collects forageable items from across the valley overnight.
log.title: Last Day's Forage
log.startup: Auto Forager v{0} loaded. Machines collect forage overnight.
log.collected: Auto Forager collected {0} items across {1} locations.
log.machine.full: Auto Forager inventory full ({0} slots). Stopped collecting.
